We've had people on vacation or out sick, new contributors stepping into new roles, and collaborations shipping products that have Unlock running at their core. A wild ride, as usual, but nothing we rodeo clowns can't handle! Let's take a quick dip into the water and see ..."
image: "/images/blog/unlock-dao-newsletter---may-2026/d9d0366c08701380196eb875c3ed4449536f65a10d386c87ca11056760f44b27.jpg"

![Unlock DAO Newsletter | May 2026](https://storage.googleapis.com/papyrus_images/d9d0366c08701380196eb875c3ed4449536f65a10d386c87ca11056760f44b27.jpg)

<h1 id="h-greetings-locksmiths" class="text-4xl font-header !mt-8 !mb-4 first:!mt-0 first:!mb-0">Greetings Locksmiths!</h1><p>Another trip around the calendar and here we are with another monthly roundup of DAO activity! Thanks for joining me on this quick journey through what has been happening with Unlock over the past month.</p><p>We've had people on vacation or out sick, new contributors stepping into new roles, and collaborations shipping products that have Unlock running at their core. A wild ride, as usual, but nothing we rodeo clowns can't handle! Let's take a quick dip into the water and see what has been going on underneath the surface:</p><hr><h2 id="h-governance-activity" class="text-3xl font-header !mt-8 !mb-4 first:!mt-0 first:!mb-0">Governance Activity</h2><ul><li><p><a target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer nofollow ugc" class="dont-break-out" href="https://governance.unlock-protocol.com/proposals/79026838315385067714503558298556039763864043509610744694306031532649908928782">DAO Constant Payment Roll March and April</a> - Passed</p></li><li><p><a target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer nofollow ugc" class="dont-break-out" href="https://governance.unlock-protocol.com/proposals/87582357924936533716113562220067679972544895174359241731002610154935678256188">Payment for the DAO collaboration platform in March and April</a> - Failed to meet quorum</p></li><li><p><a target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer nofollow ugc" class="dont-break-out" href="https://governance.unlock-protocol.com/proposals/46039474733758289953186269818009737400931825255290364012575096144396519571126">P2E Inferno — Request for Release of Second Tranche of Unlock DAO Grant</a> - Passed</p></li><li><p><a target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer nofollow ugc" class="dont-break-out" href="https://governance.unlock-protocol.com/proposals/57213503797051661386756633505886875875951869970472596401794090459825964373332">Payment for the DAO collaboration platform in March and April V1</a> - Passed</p></li></ul><p>As you can see, we missed quorum again on one of our votes, but that will happen sometimes, and we're back on the beat again, so it's business as usual in the land of DAOs!</p><p>Our resident Governance nerd, <a target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer nofollow ugc" class="dont-break-out" href="https://www.linkedin.com/in/anupadasgupta/">Anupa</a>, has started a thread on Discord to discuss proposal drafting and writing a good proposal. Make sure to check out <a target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer nofollow ugc" class="dont-break-out" href="https://discord.com/channels/462280183425138719/1496490861280628786">the thread</a> and drop your thoughts about proposals and good strategies for a successful prop.</p><p>Speaking of...</p><hr><h2 id="h-dao-operations" class="text-3xl font-header !mt-8 !mb-4 first:!mt-0 first:!mb-0">DAO Operations</h2><p>It's been an exciting time for the DAO with increased interest from contributors all across the spectrum. We have devs itching to work on <a target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer nofollow ugc" class="dont-break-out" href="https://github.com/unlock-protocol/unlock/issues?q=state%3Aopen%20label%3A%F0%9F%92%B0bounty">Github bounties</a>, community projects shipping new products utilizing Unlock, and new contributor initiatives kicking off to showcase everything that has been progressing in our ecosystem!<br></p><p>We recently had a guest appearance from a community member, <a target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer nofollow ugc" class="dont-break-out" href="https://www.linkedin.com/in/regischapman/">Regis Chapman</a>,  who has been building a tool to advance the language of DAOs and create more precise&nbsp;<a target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer nofollow ugc" class="dont-break-out" href="https://paragraph.com/@holonic-horizons/frame-language-vocabulary-is-structure-is-code-is-law">frameworks</a>&nbsp;for structuring organizations in a clearer, more accurate, and more&nbsp;intentional manner. This fits perfectly with our ongoing initiative to keep our documentation and marketing up to date, accurately reflecting who we are and how our DAO works. <a target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer nofollow ugc" class="dont-break-out" href="https://www.linkedin.com/in/stella-achenbach/">Stella </a>and <a target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer nofollow ugc" class="dont-break-out" href="https://www.linkedin.com/in/dannithomx/">Danni</a> are working to refine the process so we can push updates out as community members identify areas of improvement.</p><p>On the topic of how we represent ourselves to the public:</p><hr><h2 id="h-marketing-and-promotion-updates" class="text-3xl font-header !mt-8 !mb-4 first:!mt-0 first:!mb-0">Marketing &amp; Promotion Updates</h2><p>The <a target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer nofollow ugc" class="dont-break-out" href="https://metopia.xyz/project/unlock">Metopia Campaign</a> continues to progress as numbers keep climbing, as more people participate. As we lean into the platform more, the Metopia team continues to work with us on designing the next round as we push forward to more meaningful engagement. Keep your eyes peeled for the next campaign, designed for even deeper engagement with the protocol and to further onboard more community members and projects as we work together to get more memberships onchain in a composable and sovereign way.</p><p>The <a target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer nofollow ugc" class="dont-break-out" href="https://incented.co/">Incented</a> campaign also continues forward as we work closely with Sven to draft a program that meets the needs of our community for facilitating more decentralized participation with our marketing and promotion efforts. So get your memes ready and start drafting your elite content, because contests and opportunities to contribute are on the horizon!</p><p>U-Make-Us continues to be a hit as <a target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer nofollow ugc" class="dont-break-out" href="https://www.linkedin.com/in/anupadasgupta/">Anupa </a>starts to catch her stride with Community Projects. This is an amazing showcase of projects that have successfully integrated Unlock, giving everyone insights into how Unlock enables them to take their ideas and build seamless onchain membership management. So far, we've had 4 Episodes go live:</p><ul><li><p><a target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer nofollow ugc" class="dont-break-out" href="https://www.youtube.com/live/dhi-R6SKlRk?si=NmsThO7T8ZfK1RGQ">The Unlock Stewards</a></p></li><li><p><a target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer nofollow ugc" class="dont-break-out" href="https://www.youtube.com/live/LlsZzpQAhwA?si=G6xSQ-suxmY66urn">Thibaut w/ the ENS Integration</a></p></li><li><p><a target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer nofollow ugc" class="dont-break-out" href="https://www.youtube.com/live/mjMMtUlctOQ?si=8BchhoRmCqN-XdTt">Paul w/ Zodl</a></p></li></ul><p>And in case you missed last week's episode with <a target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer nofollow ugc" class="dont-break-out" href="https://www.youtube.com/live/lgVNM-K6X6s?si=L_NswNidlUwzFnJR">G2 and the Creative DAO</a>, here you go:</p><div data-type="youtube" videoid="lgVNM-K6X6s">
      <div class="youtube-player" data-id="lgVNM-K6X6s" style="background-image: url('https://i.ytimg.com/vi/lgVNM-K6X6s/hqdefault.jpg'); background-size: cover; background-position: center">
        <a href="https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=lgVNM-K6X6s">
          <img src="/images/blog/unlock-dao-newsletter---may-2026/play.png" class="play">
        </a>
      </div></div><hr><h2 id="h-community-projects" class="text-3xl font-header !mt-8 !mb-4 first:!mt-0 first:!mb-0">Community Projects </h2><p><a target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer nofollow ugc" class="dont-break-out" href="https://www.p2einferno.com/"><strong>P2E Inferno</strong></a><strong> -</strong> <a target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer nofollow ugc" class="dont-break-out" href="https://www.linkedin.com/in/dannithomx/">Danni </a>updated us with the first-tranche <a target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer nofollow ugc" class="dont-break-out" href="https://drive.google.com/file/d/19sP1JpD3lSaOQT_WitP4f3Z9x3tKtxoe/view">grant report</a>. Unlock is now deeply embedded across access control with learning quests including a "deploy lock" task type, and an AI discovery layer. As of the report: 157 check-ins, 811 task claims (both EAS-attested on-chain), 4 buys, and 16 sells on the vendor, and roughly 16,000 DG (~50K UP) distributed. The team pivoted from manual to automated verification — including AI-based verification (Gemini) for social-media tasks — to make the system scalable. A chess tournament partnership with Nigeria's active chess community ran over the weekend; future events will be promoted through the Discord <a target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer nofollow ugc" class="dont-break-out" href="https://discord.com/channels/462280183425138719/1153711084679725067">#share-your-event</a> channel.</p><figure float="none" data-type="figure" class="img-center"><img src="/images/blog/unlock-dao-newsletter---may-2026/769b3cbf468ef8086db13ff8b81c4497084b99f5b7c452b06d65828e95d99bc0.png" blurdataurl="data:image/png;base64," nextheight="670" nextwidth="1192" class="image-node embed"><figcaption htmlattributes="[object Object]" class="hide-figcaption"></figcaption></figure><p><a target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer nofollow ugc" class="dont-break-out" href="https://www.greengoods.app/"><strong>Green Goods/Greenwill</strong></a><strong> - </strong>First badge set deploying on Arbitrum. The three core credentials are: </p><ul><li><p>Genesis ("I am here" — early alignment, witnessed on-chain)</p></li><li><p>First Work (first garden submission)</p></li><li><p>First Support (vault deposit). </p></li></ul><p>Earth Week activations took place across Nigeria, Uganda, Kenya, New York City, Hong Kong, Venezuela, and Taiwan. The team also won a contest at Funding the Commons for additional project support.</p><figure float="none" data-type="figure" class="img-center"><img src="/images/blog/unlock-dao-newsletter---may-2026/4c6868991c621db90ea512ae7a68a6c10eff9db3e664f17d51431d0a3f9bbd15.png" blurdataurl="data:image/png;base64," nextheight="1166" nextwidth="2225" class="image-node embed"><figcaption htmlattributes="[object Object]" class="hide-figcaption"></figcaption></figure><p><strong>Phoenix Gate app</strong> - <a target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer nofollow ugc" class="dont-break-out" href="https://www.linkedin.com/in/stella-achenbach/">Stella </a>and Karel demod Phoenix Gate, the NFC burner-wallet check-in app that is nearing public release. Recent additions include a customization feature for branded event check-in screens. The build is funded by a grant from the Acronym Foundation, with a planned pilot through Digital Spenders Club. The duo is looking for beta testers once the app goes live on the Google Play Store and the AppStore. If you are interested, reach out to Stella directly via the Unlock channels.</p><figure float="none" data-type="figure" class="img-center"><img src="/images/blog/unlock-dao-newsletter---may-2026/cac7d8f2216b33cf4b7e5ec62549aab0e54eb26593da9e5eb21ea0d49007976d.png" blurdataurl="data:image/png;base64," nextheight="1705" nextwidth="3140" class="image-node embed"><figcaption htmlattributes="[object Object]" class="hide-figcaption"></figcaption></figure><p><strong>Dappcon is using Unlock again</strong> for ticketing checkout. The integration is live on the <a target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer nofollow ugc" class="dont-break-out" href="https://dappcon.io/">Dappcon site</a>. Get your ticket now before it is too late:</p><figure float="none" data-type="figure" class="img-center"><img src="/images/blog/unlock-dao-newsletter---may-2026/632907957a3e8cbf6717d24dcb5495c266e1c0f2c5e82cf2f1c3fefa1ccc9e06.png" blurdataurl="data:image/png;base64," nextheight="1878" nextwidth="3798" class="image-node embed"><figcaption htmlattributes="[object Object]" class="hide-figcaption"></figcaption></figure><hr><h2 id="h-current-action-items" class="text-3xl font-header !mt-8 !mb-4 first:!mt-0 first:!mb-0">Current Action Items</h2><p>Here's how you can get involved and prepare for the discussions coming up:</p><ol><li><p>Vote on our onchain proposals via <a target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer nofollow ugc" class="dont-break-out" href="https://governance.unlock-protocol.com/">Unlock Governance</a>, <a target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer nofollow ugc" class="dont-break-out underline underline underline-offset-2 decoration-1 decoration-current/40 hover:decoration-current focus:decoration-current" href="https://www.tally.xyz/gov/unlock-protocol">Tally</a>, or <a target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer nofollow ugc" class="dont-break-out underline underline underline-offset-2 decoration-1 decoration-current/40 hover:decoration-current focus:decoration-current" href="https://unlock.degov.ai/">degov</a></p></li><li><p>Review the following topics to add to the discussion:</p></li></ol><ul><li><p>The governance proposal FAQ thread, Anupa is opening on <a target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer nofollow ugc" class="dont-break-out" href="https://discord.com/channels/462280183425138719/1153711084679725067">Discord </a>— what barriers, questions, or hesitations have you run into when thinking about bringing a proposal forward?</p></li><li><p>Documentation gaps — if you've noticed anything outdated, missing, or unclear in the public docs, flag it now while updates are actively being prioritized.</p></li><li><p>Open <a target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer nofollow ugc" class="dont-break-out" href="https://github.com/unlock-protocol/unlock/issues?q=state%3Aopen%20label%3A%F0%9F%92%B0bounty">GitHub bounties</a> — if you're a developer, check the repo and confirm with Julien before starting work.</p></li><li><p><a target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer nofollow ugc" class="dont-break-out" href="https://www.p2einferno.com/">P2E Inferno</a> is ready for event planners to test out the platform!</p></li></ul><ol start="3"><li><p>If you are an Unlock Community Member, don't hesitate to post in our <a target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer nofollow ugc" class="dont-break-out underline underline underline-offset-2 decoration-1 decoration-current/40 hover:decoration-current focus:decoration-current" href="https://discord.com/channels/462280183425138719/927525019930738738">spotlight channel</a> so we can shed some light on what you are building!</p></li><li><p>Share our social media posts and engage with campaigns across <a target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer nofollow ugc" class="dont-break-out underline underline underline-offset-2 decoration-1 decoration-current/40 hover:decoration-current focus:decoration-current" href="https://x.com/UnlockProtocol">X</a>, <a target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer nofollow ugc" class="dont-break-out underline underline underline-offset-2 decoration-1 decoration-current/40 hover:decoration-current focus:decoration-current" href="https://www.tiktok.com/@unlock.dao?_t=ZT-8sqNLXE6lfn&amp;_r=1">Tik Tok</a>, <a target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer nofollow ugc" class="dont-break-out underline underline underline-offset-2 decoration-1 decoration-current/40 hover:decoration-current focus:decoration-current" href="https://www.linkedin.com/company/unlock-protocol-dao/">LinkedIn</a>, <a target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer nofollow ugc" class="dont-break-out underline underline underline-offset-2 decoration-1 decoration-current/40 hover:decoration-current focus:decoration-current" href="https://www.youtube.com/@UnlockProtocol%20Farcaster%20Account%20%7C%20https://warpcast.com/unlock-protocol">YouTube</a>, <a target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer nofollow ugc" class="dont-break-out underline underline underline-offset-2 decoration-1 decoration-current/40 hover:decoration-current focus:decoration-current" href="https://farcaster.xyz/unlock-protocol">Farcaster</a>—let's amplify our message together!</p></li></ol><hr><p>Thanks for following along, fellow locksmiths, and always remember:</p><h3 id="h-unlock-isnt-just-a-tool-for-access-its-a-protocol-for-belonging" class="text-2xl font-header !mt-6 !mb-4 first:!mt-0 first:!mb-0">Unlock isn't just a tool for access — it's a protocol for belonging.</h3><p>Stay classy out there, <br>Trigs</p><hr><h2 id="h-join-us" class="text-3xl font-header !mt-8 !mb-4 first:!mt-0 first:!mb-0"><strong>Join Us:</strong></h2><ul><li><p><a target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer nofollow" class="dont-break-out graf markup--anchor markup--anchor-readOnly" href="https://x.com/UnlockProtocol"><strong>X</strong></a></p></li><li><p><a target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer nofollow" class="dont-break-out graf markup--anchor markup--anchor-readOnly" href="https://www.tiktok.com/@unlock.dao?_t=ZT-8sqNLXE6lfn&amp;_r=1"><strong>Tik Tok</strong></a></p></li><li><p><a target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer nofollow" class="dont-break-out graf markup--anchor markup--anchor-readOnly" href="https://www.linkedin.com/company/unlock-protocol-dao/"><strong>LinkedIn</strong></a></p></li><li><p><a target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer nofollow" class="dont-break-out graf markup--anchor markup--anchor-readOnly" href="https://www.youtube.com/@UnlockProtocol"><strong>YouTube</strong></a></p></li><li><p><a target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer nofollow" class="dont-break-out graf markup--anchor markup--anchor-readOnly" href="https://farcaster.xyz/unlock-protocol"><strong>Farcaster</strong></a></p></li></ul><br>
